title: Add predict_proba + score to LabelPropagation and LabelSpreading
description:
sklearn semi-supervised classifiers expose ClassifierMixin's predict_proba(X) and score(X, y). ferrolearn has Predict on both but no probabilistic outputs and no mean-accuracy score.

Implementation: predict_proba assigns each query its k-NN's softmaxed similarity to each class's labeled centroid. Or simpler, just return one-hot of the predicted label (sklearn-faithful is the soft form via the propagation matrix, which the fitted struct may already have). Score is mean accuracy via predict + label comparison.
